title: Stocks Fall as Software Weakness, Tariff Risks Weigh | Closing Bell
description: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Kristine Aquino, Carol Massar and Emily Graffeo. (Source: Bloomberg)
